---
title: "Public Smoke Checks"
---

# Public Smoke Checks

This page records release-surface checks that sit outside prompt quality: package build/install, console script availability, local rendered site resources, and optional live GitHub Pages URLs.

## Package Check

Passed: `True`

| Step                                   | Passed |
| -------------------------------------- | ------ |
| build wheel and sdist                  | True   |
| create venv                            | True   |
| install wheel                          | True   |
| python -m pip show software-grimoire   | True   |
| grimoire --help                        | True   |
| grimoire-create-adoption-report --help | True   |
| grimoire-install-assets --help         | True   |
| grimoire-run-bench --help              | True   |
| grimoire-run-hardness-bench --help     | True   |
| grimoire-import-hardness-run --help    | True   |
| grimoire-check-package-index --help    | True   |

Raw package report: [package-check.json](../examples/adoption/package-check.json)

## Site Smoke Check

Passed: `True`

| Check          | Target                                                       | Passed |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ | ------ |
| local_html     | index.html                                                   | True   |
| local_html     | reference/evidence-browser.html                              | True   |
| local_html     | reference/calibration.html                                   | True   |
| local_html     | reference/hardness-v4.html                                   | True   |
| local_html     | reference/ward-science.html                                  | True   |
| local_html     | reference/canon-review-queue.html                            | True   |
| local_html     | reference/methods-structure-reviewability-warding.html       | True   |
| local_html     | reference/logical-conclusion-status.html                     | True   |
| local_html     | reference/package-index-release.html                         | True   |
| local_html     | examples/evaluations/index.html                              | True   |
| local_html     | examples/jailbreak-resilience/index.html                     | True   |
| local_resource | data/evidence_taxonomy.json                                  | True   |
| local_resource | data/evidence_index.json                                     | True   |
| local_resource | data/logical_conclusion_status.json                          | True   |
| local_resource | data/canon_review_queue.json                                 | True   |
| local_resource | examples/evaluations/model-execution-results.json            | True   |
| local_resource | examples/evaluations/hardness-v4/results.json                | True   |
| local_resource | examples/evaluations/hardness-v4/model-surface-results.json  | True   |
| local_resource | examples/evaluations/hardness-v4/manual-import-template.json | True   |
| local_resource | examples/adoption/package-index-release-plan.json            | True   |
| local_resource | examples/adoption/package-index-smoke-template.json          | True   |
| local_resource | examples/jailbreak-resilience/ab-results.json                | True   |
| local_resource | examples/jailbreak-resilience/ward-science-results.json      | True   |
| local_resource | exports/library-manifest.json                                | True   |
| local_resource | exports/checksums.sha256                                     | True   |

Raw smoke report: [public-smoke-check.json](../examples/release-gate/public-smoke-check.json)
